blockingIssues.description: POST /api/interactions pre-check is user-scoped for (channel, source_id) conflicts while the DB unique partial index is global, so duplicates from another user can surface as 500 insert errors instead of the required 409 conflict.
PATCH /api/interactions/:id allows contactId reassignment without validating ownership of the new contact, creating a cross-user linkage/isolation gap.
useContacts.bulkCreate() discards bulk-import response/error details and returns an empty array, enabling false-success UI messaging even when some imports fail.
Required rendering-focused tests were not delivered: the added interaction timeline tests are explicitly logic-only and do not render InteractionTimeline or contact detail UI states.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update mission guidance that still says npm run check has 10 pre-existing TypeScript errors.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Current implementation milestone validators pass with `npm run check` exit code 0; stale guidance can cause workers to skip full typecheck verification.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify RED-first guidance for inherited worktrees and partially implemented features by requiring explicit documentation when tests cannot be written first.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of interactions-api-routes reported implementation edits occurred before tests while skill procedure mandates strict tests-first.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit acceptance criteria mapping from feature requirements to required test types (including rendering tests) and document inherited-worktree handling when preexisting implementation is present.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two api-and-ui frontend reviews flagged mismatch between required testing behavior and actual implementation/testing sequence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Either enforce or explicitly scope exceptions for the rule that all DB operations go through server/storage.ts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: interactions-api-routes introduced a direct Drizzle dedup query in routes.ts despite mission guidance stating all DB operations should go through storage.

rejectedObservations.observation: Auth-gated UI validation is expensive due to OAuth/session setup complexity.
frontend-worker tests-first mismatch was reported by multiple reviews.
